title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 411.755 - Failure to pay fees, effect of
text:
411.755.  Failure to pay fees, effect of. — Failure to pay any fees authorized by this chapter within forty-five days of assessment shall be grounds for the suspension, revocation or refusal to renew any license issued under this chapter.
(L. 1977 S.B. 75 § 15, A.L. 1980 S.B. 601)
